features: Required client service location at client signup
Client signup captures property/business name, service address, city, state, and ZIP
Client Approval Center displays submitted service location before approval
Client approval creates/updates active client and primary service property records
Agency Dispatch board for agency-accepted marketplace jobs
Agency Admin can assign agency guards to accepted jobs
Guard assignment updates marketplace_jobs.assigned_guard_id and current_status
Platform Admin job detail shows accepted agency and assigned guard
Preserves v4.0.1 Agency Job Board and v4.0.2 Client Approval Center
